case_title: JUAN F. LUQUE INC. VS. SHERYL SCHIERENBERG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUAN F. LUQUE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,455.20 FILED BY JUAN F. LUQUE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SCHIERENBERG, SHERYL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED OCT-05-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SCHIERENBERG, SHERYL
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF AUG-01-2014
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY JUAN F. LUQUE INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUAN F. LUQUE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHIERENBERG, SHERYL $2,455.20 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,555.20, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
